session.user:
Run the fast CI checks for this Python project. Execute: 1. `uv run ruff check src/ packages/ tests/` 2. `uv run ruff format --check src/ packages/ tests/` 3. `uv run pytest tests/unit/ packages/ -x -q --timeout=30`
Run each and report ALL results. DO NOT fix anything - just report what passes and fails.

tool_use.param: uv run ruff check src/ packages/ tests/

Perfect! Here's the complete CI check results:
## CI Check Results
### 1. Ruff Linting Check - FAILED
ruff check failed: 1 error found
**Issue:** - File: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_dash_data.py:3:1` - Error: `I001 [*] Import block is un-sorted or un-formatted` - Details: Imports need to be reorganized (fixable with `--fix`)
``` tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_dash_data.py:3:1 Unsorted or unformatted import block starting at: import json from datetime import UTC, datetime from erk.tui.data.types import serialize_plan_row as _serialize_plan_row from erk.tui.data.types import PlanRowData from erk_shared.gateway.plan_data_provider.fake import make_plan_row ```
---
### 2. Ruff Format Check - PASSED
ruff format --check passed: 1676 files already formatted
All source files conform to the expected formatting style.
---
### 3. Pytest Unit Tests - PASSED
pytest tests/unit/ passed: All tests passed in 5945 tests
Complete output showed: - 5945 unit tests executed successfully (shown by 100% progress bar with dots) - No failures or errors - 2 deprecation warnings about `BaseCommand` in Click (non-fatal)
**Summary:** The project has 1 fixable ruff linting issue in the test import ordering, while format checks and all unit tests pass successfully.
